articles.description: The lawyer said the couple came to the Supreme Court under the mistaken belief, influenced by social media reels, that they could get married within the court premises and receive immediate protection from the Chief Justice of India

articles.title: Indian Basmati Rice Exports Hit As Freight Costs Double; Domestic Prices Drop 10%
articles.description: Exporters say freight rates to Gulf markets have doubled in recent weeks, driven by higher war risk premiums, vessel re-routing, and container shortages.

articles.title: Bottom-up stock picking crucial as market risks rise: Rajiv Batra
articles.description: Investors face a volatile market. Discipline and risk management are crucial now. Capital preservation is key for future gains. Defensives offer some protection but are not foolproof. A bottom-up approach is advised. Banking, especially PSU banks, looks promising. Governance is a key differentiator. Auto sector demand impact will be delayed. A balanced strategy is essential.

topStories.description: The caveats aim to ensure that the apex court hears the CBI before passing any orders.

topStories.title: Donald Trump's 'Truths': How Social Posts Are Waging Iran Narrative War
topStories.description: Trump's Truth Social blasts narrate the Iran war like no leader before -  viral diplomacy over secret scribbles. NATO flip-flops, Israel deflections, oil chaos all combine his "narrative airstrikes"...

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Sun Tzu: ‘All warfare is based on deception. Hence, when we are able to attack, we must…’
topStories.description: While none of us plans to wage a war, the philosophy behind Sun Tzu's quote lies a single, uncomfortable truth: Deception is not a bug in the system; it is the system.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 21 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: Tehran has warned of zero restraint if energy facilities are attacked again, while Netanyahu points to ground operation.

topStories.title: Supreme Court grants regular bail to Muppidi Avinash Reddy, an accused in Andhra liquor 'scam' case
topStories.description: The court said the regular bail would continue during the pendency of the trial proceedings in the case

topStories.title: "Wish I Had Never Met Him": Norway Crown Princess After Epstein Link
topStories.description: Norway's Crown Princess Mette-Marit said she was "manipulated" by convicted US sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, in an interview broadcast Friday in which she sought...

topStories.title: Watch: Video Shows US F-35 Fighter Jet Hit In Iran's Skies
topStories.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) separately claimed responsibility for striking the aircraft.

topStories.title: Supreme Court quashes copyright case against filmmaker Sujoy Ghosh over his 'Kahaani 2' film
topStories.description: The Supreme Court bench allowed Sujoy Ghosh's plea, challenging a Jharkhand High Court's order, which had refused to quash the proceedings pending against him.

topStories.title: Rs 1 lakh crore wiped off! Bajaj Finance shares tumble 18% in March so far amid raging Iran-US war
topStories.description: Bajaj Finance shares have plunged over 20% in a month, eroding more than Rs 1 lakh crore in market value amid escalating Iran-US tensions. Rising oil prices, inflation concerns and macroeconomic risks flagged by Moody’s have weighed on sentiment, dragging financial stocks lower and keeping investors cautious amid ongoing geopolitical uncertainty.

topStories.title: Congress, Raijor Dal finalise alliance; State party gets 11 seats
topStories.description: Akhil Gogoi will contest from Sivasagar, a seat he won in the last polls while still in prison on sedition charges for allegedly instigating violence during the Citizenship Amendment Act (CAA) protests.

topStories.title: ‘Benjamin Netanyahu, will you end Iran war if Donald Trump asks you to?’ Israeli PM responds
topStories.description: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu dismissed death rumours at his first press conference since the Iran war began. He defended Israel's strategy against Iran and confirmed a commitment to avoid striking oil facilities.

dailyNews.title: FIFA’s Gianni Infantino seemingly changes course on peace efforts
dailyNews.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino said his organisation “can certainly not solve geopolitical conflicts.”

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump, Japan's Takaichi announce $40 billion US nuclear reactor project
dailyNews.description: President Trump and Japanese PM Takaichi announced a $40 billion nuclear power project in the southern US, featuring small modular reactors by GE Vernova and Hitachi.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court quashes FIR against YouTuber Elvish Yadav in snake venom case
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court quashed the FIR against YouTuber Elvish Yadav, citing legal insufficiencies in the allegations of snake venom use and drug involvement.

dailyNews.title: Trump must ‘take the steering wheel back from the Israelis’ in Iran war
dailyNews.description: Trita Parsi, argues that US President Trump must not allow Israel to control the war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: American diplomat Henry Kissinger's words of wisdom on politics ― ‘Power is the ultimate aphrodisiac’
dailyNews.description: Henry Kissinger, a prominent U.S. diplomat and strategist, was known for his role in Cold War policies.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi's key dialogue with Qatar, Oman, Jordan, France amid Iran-US war: ‘Attacks on energy condemnable’
dailyNews.description: PM Modi condemned the attacks targeting energy infrastructure in West Asia. He also called for dialogue and diplomacy to restore peace, security and stability.

dailyNews.title: Man accused of shooting father in face with crossbow captured after snowy manhunt
dailyNews.description: A West Virginia man was arrested after allegedly shooting his father in the face with a crossbow and leading police on a snowy multi-county manhunt.

dailyNews.title: Media under fire: Journalists keep questioning Iran war as Hegseth calls them ‘unpatriotic’ and ‘anti-Trump’
dailyNews.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth slams media coverage of Iran conflict as "dishonest" while President Donald Trump reportedly rebukes Israeli allies over gas field bombing.

dailyNews.title: Feds charge 3 in $2.5b scheme to smuggle us AI tech to China using dummy servers
dailyNews.description: Three men linked to Supermicro are accused of smuggling $2.5 billion in AI technology to China via fake documents and shell companies, prosecutors allege.

dailyNews.title: Missing University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey found dead in Barcelona
dailyNews.description: The body of University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey, 20, was recovered at Port Olimpic in Barcelona after a days-long search, his family confirmed.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine peace talks on ‘situational pause’ as Middle East conflict intensifies: Kremlin
dailyNews.description: The Kremlin says Ukraine peace talks are on a 'situational pause' as Zelenskyy signals a Ukrainian team could resume negotiations as soon as Saturday.

dailyNews.title: Indiana University philanthropy group allegedly led fundraising training with Hamas-linked 'sham charity'
dailyNews.description: Indiana University's Muslim Philanthropy Initiative allegedly partnered with Hayat Yolu, a Treasury-sanctioned group accused of funding Hamas.

topStories.title: Trump’s Complaint About Israeli Strike on Gas Field Exposes Divergent Strategies
topStories.description: President Trump said he told Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu of Israel he disapproved of the attack, which sent energy markets reeling. But Israeli officials said the Americans were informed beforehand.

topStories.title: Trump Says He Won’t Send Troops to Iran but Leaves Wiggle Room
topStories.description: The president was cagey about his plans for Iran. He confirmed the Pentagon was seeking $200 billion to support a protracted war effort while also claiming it would be over soon.

topStories.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Meeting With Japan’s Prime Minister
topStories.description: Breaking a taboo, President Trump needled Japan’s prime minister about the World War II attack, as she widened her eyes and appeared to take a deep breath in the Oval Office.

topStories.title: Using Charm and Restraint, Japan’s Leader Mostly Avoids Trump’s Wrath
topStories.description: During her first visit to the White House, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi drew praise from President Trump. But the war in the Middle East will test their relationship.

topStories.title: How Japan Reacted to Trump’s Pearl Harbor Joke
topStories.description: Some people criticized President Trump’s decision to invoke a painful chapter of history. Others worried it might harm U.S.-Japan relations.

topStories.title: A Gift From Trump to the Supreme Court
topStories.description: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

dailyNews.title: Judge Rules That R.F.K. Jr. Overstepped on Transgender Care
dailyNews.description: The ruling provides temporary relief for 21 states seeking to stop the Trump administration from ending federal funding to hospitals that provide gender-transition care.

dailyNews.title: Can Military Excellence Save Us From Trump’s Incompetence?
dailyNews.description: It should never have come to this.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Putting His Stamp on the World
dailyNews.description: Be careful what you wish for.

dailyNews.title: Late Night Pans Trump’s Pearl Harbor Joke
dailyNews.description: “Let me tell you: There is no doubt in my mind that everything he knows about Pearl Harbor begins and ends with a movie starring Ben Affleck,” Jimmy Kimmel said.

dailyNews.title: Federal commission made up of Trump appointees approves design of his gold coin
dailyNews.description: The vote by the U.S. Commission of Fine Arts, whose members are supporters of the president and were appointed by him earlier this year, was without objection.

dailyNews.title: 3/19: CBS Evening News
dailyNews.description: Iran war escalates; Trump downplays war's impact on energy prices.

dailyNews.title: Rep. Carlos Giménez says "the uprising is starting" in Cuba
dailyNews.description: As President Trump talks of "taking Cuba," Republican Rep. Carlos Giménez of Florida is pushing for regime change. Giménez joins "The Takeout" to assess the state of the island's government.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals DOJ should continue Powell probe, complicating Warsh Fed nomination
dailyNews.description: Powell has accused the DOJ of investigating him in retaliation for his refusal to lower interest rates as much or as quickly as Trump has demanded.

dailyNews.title: Trump invokes Pearl Harbor in front of Japanese prime minister to defend Iran attack secrecy
dailyNews.description: During the meeting, Trump praised Japan for "stepping up" to assist in efforts to secure the Strait of Hormuz, "unlike NATO."

dailyNews.title: Hegseth says potential $200 billion Iran war spending request could shift: 'Takes money to kill bad guys'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's National Economic Council director, Kevin Hassett, said Sunday that the war has already cost $12 billion.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
